summary: Them trung tam cap nhat trong UI va release metadata cho NAS deploy.
changes: Them release manifest version + mo ta ngan de UI hien thi ban dang chay va ban moi nhat.
Bo sung API kiem tra update, trigger update thu cong, va runtime config updater khong can .env.
Mo rong setup NAS/UI de cau hinh update feed, trigger URL, va xem tien trinh cap nhat.
